prompt: Premium product shot of a iPhone 17 Pro Max floating diagonally above a glossy white circular pedestal in a minimal pale mint green and warm cream studio environment. Show exactly one smartphone, front-facing at a three-quarter angle, tilted slightly left, with a slim black bezel, metallic dark side rails, visible side buttons, bottom speaker holes, charging port, and a pill-shaped dynamic-island cutout at the top. The screen displays an elegant green abstract wallpaper with soft translucent oval shapes and centered white text reading “iPhone 17 Pro Max”; include small lock-screen icons near the bottom. Use soft studio lighting, smooth gradients, a large curved mint backdrop, a creamy vertical light area on the right, realistic glass reflections, subtle highlights along the metal frame, and a diffused shadow directly beneath the floating phone on the glossy surface. Hyper-realistic textures, commercial advertising style, ultra-clean composition, wide landscape crop, no extra objects, no hands, no watermark.
